text: 70-year-old lady with complaints of intractable cough over last two months was investigated and diagnosed with tumor in left main bronchus coming from left upper lobe.
plan was to see how the left upper lobe is involved and to do a left upper lobectomy with sleeve resection of left main bronchus.
Lesion was around 6 cm from carina.
